zh.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth是Thomas de Worth的兒子，於1280年出生在英國英格蘭爾沃斯。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1349年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth是Thomas de Worth的儿子，于1280年出生在英国英格兰爾沃斯。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1349年在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Worth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Worth, for example in Cheshire, Dorset, Sussex, and Kent, from Old English worth ‘enclosure, settlement’. The vocabulary word probably survived into the Middle English period in the sense of a subsidiary settlement dependent on a main village, and in some cases the surname may be a topographic name derived from this use. Compare Worthy .
North German: topographic name from Middle Low German wort ‘enclosure, elevated piece of land, farmstead’, or a habitational name from a place so named in northern Germany.

variants.name: Word
meanings: Perhaps an Americanized form of Dutch Van der Woord, a habitational name from any of the places called Woord or Woerd.

variants.name: Wortmann
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived on a raised, secure site, Middle Low German wort + man ‘man’. Compare Worth 2.

variants.name: Worthy
meanings: English: from Middle English worthi ‘enclosure’ (Old English worthig, weorthig, wurthig). The surname is probably habitational, from a place so named, such as Worthy (Hampshire, Devon) and Worthy Hill Farm (Wiltshire).

variants.name: Wurdeman
meanings: Americanized form of North German Wurdemann, also Würdemann: topographic name from Middle Low German wurt ‘farm area, field, woodland’. Compare Worth .
Americanized form of German Würdemann: from an ancient Germanic personal name formed with Old High German wirdi ‘dignity’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Wirth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Gunter, Dieter, Ernst, Gerhard, Manfred, Reinhold, Armin, Erna.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for an inn-keeper, Middle High German wirt, German Wirt.
German: status name for a man who was head of a family and master of his own household, from the same word in the sense ‘provider’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth was born in 1280, in Worth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Thomas de Worth. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth est né en 1280, à Worth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Thomas de Worth. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth wurde 1280 in Worth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Thomas de Worth geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1349 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth è nato il nel 1280 nel Worth, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Thomas de Worth. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1349, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth(은)는 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워스에서 Thomas de Worth의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth nasceu em 1280, em Worth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Thomas de Worth. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1349, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth родился в 1280 г. в местности ворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Thomas de Worth. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Henry de Worth nació en 1280, en Worth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Thomas de Worth. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1349, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
